§6Power Core (Low)§f

§aThe foundational component for basic modular power storage!§f

The §bPower Core (Low)§f is the entry-level crafting ingredient of the RFTools Power mod. It stores no energy on its own but serves as the energetic nucleus required to construct the initial tier of Powercells.

§6Usage§f:
§b• Crafting Component§f: Essential for assembling the §9Powercell (Low)§f.
§b• Progression Starter§f: You must craft this core before any modular energy storage blocks can be built, marking your entry into RFTools' advanced power grid systems.

§6Crafting§f:
§eCrafted in a shaped recipe with:§f
§b• 1× Diamond§f (center)
§b• 1× Redstone Block§f (top-center)
§b• 4× Redstone§f (remaining cardinal positions)

§6Strategic Role§f:
Power Core (Low) is the cheapest entry into the modular RF storage family. A single Redstone Block + Diamond + Redstone combination unlocks the entire Powercell multiblock network. Once you have four of these cores, you can craft your first Powercell (Low) and begin scaling your base's energy buffer.

§eTip§f: Craft at least §e8 cores§f before building your first Powercell — this lets you construct a 2×2×2 network immediately and benefit from the per-block transfer rate multiplier from day one.
